Product Overview:
Product Overview

Product Information

The pollutants like soot, fine dust, pollen and many other substances are constantly present on construction sites, on farmland and of course along every kilometre you drive. If the air filter is damaged, dirt particles can enter the combustion chamber, creating score marks on the pistons and eventually leading to premature engine wear. Electronic components such as sensors located along the path between the combustion chamber and air intake may also sustain damage due to inadequate filtration and, in the worst-case scenario, they may get destroyed. However, there is an easy solution to all this. Simply rely on original equipment quality air filters for commercial vehicles. Moreover, With a high-quality engine air filter that captures dust, pollen, soot and water droplets in the engine air you can keep your engine in equilibrium.
